justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified that March 3rd had passed and then accurately understood the user's subsequent date and time requests.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent only reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering any alternative options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made a slight error by not offering alternative slots when the initial request was unavailable, leading to an extra turn for the user to suggest a new time.
justifications.customer_experience: The experience was workable but slightly tiring because the agent did not proactively offer alternative times when the requested slots were unavailable.
